heading: Short title
label: 674 Short title
text: This Act may be cited as the “Agricultural Marketing Agreement Act of 1937”.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which among other things enacted this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act June 3, 1937, ch. 29650 Stat. 246
